title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Jinbe, Big Mom as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you've finally entered the range of my ability!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doing this makes us look like we're bullying them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did they get this close to us so quickly!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Look at the ships in the front!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way that we can escape from all of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were able to barely survive until this point, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What!? The surface of the sea is swelling up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: gives the boss any troubleee Eee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that guy... He was a member of Hody's crew on Fishman Island....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We came to see you offffffffffffffffff!!!! Captain jinbeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Backup arrives from the sea!! The 900th chapter debuts in the next issue and will start with a leading cover page!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're still gonna be your subordinates until you make it out of big mom's territory, alright?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 28 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
